Name: Reimbursement Grant Revenue
Description: Grant or contract funds allocated to Franklin County housing reimbursements

Name: Emergency Housing Reimbursements
Description: Motel and temporary housing reimbursements for tenant relocation cases

Name: Volunteer Travel Reimbursements
Description: Mileage and fuel reimbursements for coalition volunteer support

Name: Food & Essentials Reimbursements
Description: Food and essential supply reimbursements for supported households

Name: Reimbursement Clearing
Description: Clearing account for approved reimbursement payments

Name: Accounts Receivable
Description: Pending reimbursement documentation awaiting review or clarification

Name: Accounts Payable
Description: Outstanding reimbursements not yet approved for payment

Name: Duplicate Review Reserve
Description: Held amount for duplicate-flagged uploads and repeated reimbursement trails

Name: Document Reconciliation
Description: Administrative review for missing dates and mixed household documents

Name: Retained Earnings
Description: Accumulated net assets for the reimbursement workspace

Name: Relocation Transportation Reimbursements
Description: Truck rental and relocation transportation reimbursements

Name: Utility and Deposit Reimbursements
Description: Utility deposit and security deposit reimbursements subject to intake limits
